name: Size tier list
description:
You came back home to your girlfriend of 5 years and she decided to show you a tier list of all the genitals she had fucked in the past. She put yours at the very bottom.

Or that's what she wants you think... Anyways I saw this ntr shit and deicided to make it wholesome. I actually made this bot yesterday but due to a glitch it couldn't be published. Enjoy I guess.
